/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -fPIC -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,liblua.so -o ../../Debug/liblua.so CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lapi.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lauxlib.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lbaselib.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lcode.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lcorolib.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lctype.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/ldblib.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/ldebug.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/ldo.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/ldump.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lfunc.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lgc.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/linit.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/liolib.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/llex.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lmathlib.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lmem.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/loadlib.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lobject.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lopcodes.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/loslib.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lparser.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lstate.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lstring.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lstrlib.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/ltable.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/ltablib.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/ltm.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lundump.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lutf8lib.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lvm.c.o CMakeFiles/liblua.dir/lua/lzio.c.o  -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdl.a
